query: SELECT r.respondent_id, r.employment_status, r.income_bracket, r.age_bracket, sr.study_id, sr.channel, sr.is_complete, i.item_index, i.raw_answer, i.numeric_score FROM business->biz_response_item i INNER JOIN business->biz_survey_response sr ON sr.response_id = i.response_id INNER JOIN shared->respondent r ON r.respondent_id = sr.respondent_id

query: SELECT ew.wave_id, ew.wave_date, ew.study_id, r.respondent_id, r.country_iso, r.education_level, r.age_bracket, ew.employment_status, ew.job_sector, ew.weekly_hours, ew.gross_monthly_usd, ew.job_satisfaction, ew.financial_anxiety FROM business->biz_employment_wave ew INNER JOIN shared->respondent r ON r.respondent_id = ew.respondent_id

query: SELECT rm.run_id, rm.metric_name, rm.split, rm.value, rm.std_dev, rm.k_folds, er.hardware_tag, er.train_time_secs, er.peak_memory_mb, er.status, a.name, a.family, a.task_type FROM cs->run_metric rm INNER JOIN cs->experiment_run er ON er.id = rm.run_id INNER JOIN cs->algorithm a ON a.id = er.algorithm_id WHERE er.status = 'Completed'

query: SELECT hp.run_id, hp.param_name, hp.param_value, hp.param_type, er.hardware_tag, er.random_seed, a.name, a.family, a.task_type FROM cs->hyperparameter  hp INNER JOIN cs->experiment_run  er ON er.id = hp.run_id INNER JOIN cs->algorithm a ON a.id = er.algorithm_id WHERE er.status = 'Completed'

query: SELECT sr.response_id, sr.respondent_id, sr.collected_at, sr.channel, sr.completion_secs, sr.is_complete, s.title, s.topic, s.research_type, si.name, si.scale_type, si.item_count FROM   business->biz_survey_response sr INNER JOIN business->biz_study s ON s.study_id = sr.study_id INNER JOIN shared->survey_instrument si  ON si.instrument_id = sr.instrument_id
